headline: Carrier Global Backs Heat Geek To Target European Heat Pump Growth
summary: Carrier Global (NYSE:CARR) has invested in UK based Heat Geek, a residential heat pump specialist. The move targets growth opportunities in European home heating and clean energy solutions. The partnership focuses on accelerating adoption of residential heat pumps across Europe. Carrier Global, trading at $55.71, sits at the center of a sector where heating, cooling and building efficiency are in focus for policy makers and households alike. The stock is up 39.0% over the past 3 years and...

headline: How Carrier’s Heat Geek Bet And Portfolio Shift At Carrier Global (CARR) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In March 2026, Carrier Global’s venture arm invested in UK-based Heat Geek, a platform using AI tools to connect European homeowners with certified heat pump installers and support system design, as the company continued reshaping its portfolio around HVAC and refrigeration after divesting fire, security, and commercial refrigeration businesses. This move, alongside slow organic growth, weaker residential demand and lower guidance, highlights Carrier’s push into cleaner, higher-value HVAC...
